title: PowerShards
description: PowerShards is a plugin which adds shards in your server that gives you different powers
body:
**Heavenly Shard (Aqua) - Celestial power, slow falling, regeneration
Ultimate: Infinite Trident Storm with lightning strikes

Hellfire Shard (Red) - Forged in Nether flames, fire immunity, strength
Ultimate: Rain of Hell - 100 fireballs + massive finale fireball

Soul Shard (Dark Purple) - Bound to departed spirits, night vision, invisibility
Ultimate: Soul Explosion - Endless waves building to giant pillar

Ancient Shard (Gold) - Ancient relic, haste, resistance
Ultimate: Earthquake - Continuous tremors ending in mega ground shatter

Void Shard (Dark Gray) - Torn from the void, teleport blink ability
Ultimate: Phase Shift - Void rifts pulling mobs into black hole implosion

Storm Shard (Yellow) - Storm energy, speed, lightning strikes
Ultimate: Tornado - Chain lightning erupting into 50-bolt thunderstorm

Blood Shard (Dark Red) - Stolen life force, lifesteal on hit
Ultimate: Frenzy - Infinite lifesteal exploding into Blood Nova

Divine Shard (Light Purple) - Crafted from 4 shards + heavy core + 4 totems
Ultimate: Divine Judgement - Black clouds cover sky, all 4 ultimates fire at once

Right Click for normal ability 

Shift+Right Click for Ultimate 

Ultimate only works if your energy bar is full

Enjoy Playing!**
